headline: History of Chevron: Company timeline & facts
summary: In the beginning, there was Pico Canyon. The location in California’s Santa Susana Mountains entered history in 1865 when a hunter named Ramon Peria noticed dark, green-colored oil in a spring. Peria concluded the stuff was valuable, the Los Angeles Times reported in 1882, and, boy, was he right. ...

headline: Chevron (CVX) Valuation Check As Middle East Supply Shocks Support Energy Producer Pricing
summary: Recent conflict in the Middle East, including Iranian missile strikes and the closure of the Strait of Hormuz, has pushed energy security back into focus and put Chevron (CVX) in the spotlight for many investors. See our latest analysis for Chevron. Chevron’s share price has moved sharply higher in recent months, with a 30-day share price return of 11.6% and a 90-day gain of 36.3%. Meanwhile, the 1-year total shareholder return of 29.9% and 5-year total shareholder return of 136.4% point to...

headline: US Sees ‘Possibility of Diplomacy’ With Iran as War Costs Rise
summary: (Bloomberg) -- President Donald Trump signaled that Iran had offered a “present” as a show of good faith in negotiations he has claimed are ongoing to end a 25-day conflict that’s upended global markets, even while he deploys more troops to the Middle East.Trump wouldn’t detail the gift, “worth a tremendous amount of money,” but confirmed it was related to energy flows through the Strait of Hormuz. A Thai ship passed through the vital waterway earlier Tuesday, Iran’s Tasnim news agency reported.

content.title: US Sees ‘Possibility of Diplomacy’ With Iran as War Costs Rise
content.summary: (Bloomberg) -- President Donald Trump signaled that Iran had offered a “present” as a show of good faith in negotiations he has claimed are ongoing to end a 25-day conflict that’s upended global markets, even while he deploys more troops to the Middle East.Trump wouldn’t detail the gift, “worth a tremendous amount of money,” but confirmed it was related to energy flows through the Strait of Hormuz. A Thai ship passed through the vital waterway earlier Tuesday, Iran’s Tasnim news agency reported.

headline: Oil Drops on Reports of US Diplomatic Push to End War With Iran
summary: (Bloomberg) -- Oil fell on reports of a US diplomatic push to end the war with Iran, which eclipsed news that more troops would be sent to the region.West Texas Intermediate sank as much as 4.9% to below $88 a barrel after rising Tuesday. Israel’s Channel 12 said Washington was seeking a one-month ceasefire for talks. Separately, the New York Times reported the US sent Iran a 15-point plan to end the conflict, citing officials briefed on the move.Earlier, President Donald Trump’s administration
